{{Infobox madra
| name = blood madra
| introduced = Soulsmith
}}

''See also: [[blood madra Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Blood madra]] is one of the seven primary aspects of madra, alongside fire, earth, wind, water, force, and [[life]]. It is characterized by its ability to disproportionately affect living flesh, often causing it to tear apart or suffer intense burning sensations upon contact. While it is highly effective at destroying tissue, this specialization can make it less efficient for other types of combat compared to more versatile aspects. In certain contexts, blood [[madra]] can be used for healing by removing unhealthy tissue, though it is often paired with [[life madra]] to smooth and integrate the new growth. This aspect is frequently associated with other powers; for instance, it can be blended with [[sword madra]] or [[hunger madra]]. The [[Dreadgod]] known as the [[Bleeding Phoenix]] is composed of a blend of blood and [[hunger madra]], appearing to bleed because it holds other consumed aspects in gelatinous spheres. [[The Phoenix]] also creates bloodspawn, which are red, puppet-like constructs grown from spilled blood that feed on [[madra]]. Additionally, blood [[madra]] can manifest as physical entities like the [[Blood Shadow]] or animated birds. Because of its affinity for living things, blood [[madra]] can be used to strengthen muscles or sense [[life]], but it also carries the risk of drawing unwanted attention from creatures that seek it out.}}

== Soulsmith ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|The [[Remnant]] flickers with [[blood madra]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c3">''Soulsmith'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Blood madra]] is a type of [[madra]] that supposedly holds sinister powers over living bodies.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c4">''Soulsmith'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Blackflame ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Yerin]] once hauled on a rope of [[blood madra]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c19">''Blackflame'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Skysworn ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|bloodspawn are made of [[blood madra]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c9">''Skysworn'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Blood madra]] removes unhealthy tissue and grows more.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c13">''Skysworn'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Blood madra]] can break down skin and control the body by tearing it apart.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c17">''Skysworn'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Blood madra]] is characterized by its distinct red color. This type of [[madra]] serves as the primary component for [[Northstrider's Remnant]] and is also utilized by the [[Red Faith]]. During her journey, [[Yerin]] begins to use blood [[madra]] herself. Consequently, she will need to refine her existing techniques to accommodate the introduction of this new element.}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">5</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Northstrider's Remnant]] is made mostly of [[blood madra]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c3">''Wintersteel'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Red Faith]] uses [[blood madra]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c7">''Wintersteel'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The color of [[blood madra]] is red.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c7" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yerin]] uses [[blood madra]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c18">''Wintersteel'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yerin]]'s techniques will require refining due to the introduction of [[blood madra]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c26">''Wintersteel'', chapter 26</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Bloodline ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Blood madra]] disproportionately affects flesh.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c17">''Bloodline'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Bloodspawn]] are constructed from [[blood madra]] and the will of the [[Phoenix]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c17" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Reaper ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Blood madra]] is harder to use for cutting if there is no blood present.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c12">''Reaper'', chapter 12</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|A spirit was [[Forged]] of [[blood madra]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c23">''Reaper'', chapter 23</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Dreadgod ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Redmoon Hall]] is a [[Netherworld]] of flashing [[blood madra]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c14">''Dreadgod'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Yerin]] helps manage the [[blood madra]] inside [[Little Blue]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c14" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Yerin]] and [[Lindon]] were studying [[blood madra]] to complete her new [[Path]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c22">''Dreadgod'', chapter 22</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Waybound ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Northstrider]]'s [[Striker technique]] used [[blood madra]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c9">''Waybound'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The red-winged human avatar of the [[Dreadgod]] was formed from [[blood madra]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c25">''Waybound'', chapter 25</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Reigan Shen]] can pull javelins of [[blood madra]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c1">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 1</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[blood madra]] is used for strengthening muscles in [[Overlord]] bodies.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c3">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Madra]]
[[Category:Soulsmith]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Ghostwater]]
